title: TrustSourceType
description: Types of cryptographic trust material sources

TRUST_LIST.description: A published list of trusted issuer certificates (e.g., AAMVA IACA trust list, EU Trusted List)

PINNED_ISSUER.description: A specific issuer certificate pinned directly in the Trust Profile

ROOT_CA.description: A root Certificate Authority certificate from which issuer trust is derived
ROOT_CA.use_case: ICAO CSCA roots, private enterprise CA

PKD_URL.description: ICAO Public Key Directory URL for automatic CSCA/Document Signer fetching
